examples: The order goes: handsome guy, then the goat and then you, Quasimodo.

Quasimodo is born with a hunched back and a face that only a mother could love.
As for the mysterious disappearance of Quasimodo, this is all that we have to be able to discover.
Cage, his face screwed up with rage, one shoulder hitched higher than the other from a back injury, looks like Quasimodo without a bell rope to hang on to.
